Dark Mode: Beyond just inverted colors
How to implement a dark theme that actually helps user concentration and reduces eye strain.

# Proper Dark Mode

Implementing dark mode is more than just flipping a switch from white to black backgrounds.

## Eye Strain

We use a deep charcoal instead of pure black to reduce contrast vibrations, ensuring a more comfortable reading experience.

A comprehensive guide on how to set up and customize your Astro Paper blog for maximum efficiency and reach.

# Getting Started

Welcome to your new Astro Paper blog!

Astro is a modern web framework that pulls your content from anywhere and serves it fast with less client-side JavaScript.

## Why Astro?

- **Zero JS Runtime:** Astro renders HTML on the server and strips away unused JavaScript.
- **Islands Architecture:** Only hydrate the components that need interactivity.
- **Content Collections:** Type-safe management of your Markdown and MDX content.

Getting Started

Welcome to your new Astro Paper blog!

Astro is a modern web framework that pulls your content from anywhere and serves it fast with less client-side JavaScript.

Why Astro?

  • Zero JS Runtime: Astro renders HTML on the server and strips away unused JavaScript.
  • Islands Architecture: Only hydrate the components that need interactivity.
  • Content Collections: Type-safe management of your Markdown and MDX content.
Why I chose IBM Plex Mono for UI
Discussing the legibility and aesthetic benefits of using monospace fonts in modern technical documentation.

# Monospace Aesthetics

Monospace fonts aren't just for code editors. They bring a specific "technical authority" to user interfaces.

## Legibility

IBM Plex Mono is designed to be readable at small sizes, making it perfect for technical blogs where information density is high.
